runLabel: 🐛 BUG — Dynamic Handicap not shown for all suppliers

tests.description: Dynamic Handicap configured for all suppliers in builder, but only Supplier 1 shows it on event page
tests.expected: All 5 suppliers (S1 + Bot 1-4) should display their Dynamic Handicap value (+10) in the Bid table on the event page, matching the builder configuration
tests.observed: Only Supplier 1 has the Dynamic Handicap applied/visible in the Bid table. Bots 1-4 don't show their +10 dynamic handicap despite being configured in the builder
